race.comment: ZEEMA (13) led and put up a real fight but was collared close to home over 1200m at Queanbeyan last start. Has never raced over a trip this sharp but she does possess plenty of natural pace so she should give backers a great sight. FALCON GOLD (5) continued his good run of form last time out when a brave third over 1000m at Queanbeyan after leading for much of the way. Draws a far better gate this time. Likely leader who will prove tough to peg back. SHADDAP (3) wasn't beaten far first-up in a BM58 at Bathurst but has struggled since in far tougher races. Blinkers go on for the first time today so he might be a surprise packet. DENMAN FORCE (8) returned from a seven-month spell and was lining up for only the second time when a game third over 1000m at Dubbo five weeks ago. Kept fresh and should be in this for a long way. XSPIRITOUS (7) has a fine record at this trip and has placed at two of three first-up runs so keep her in mind off a six-month break.
